Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-30 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis - momentum-ranker Today's data shows two exceptionally strong momentum candidates at the top of the rankings. EC leads at rank 1 with a composite score of 95.1, driven by outstanding ratio consistency (98.5/100) and resilience during market downturns (96.1/100 bad-SPY score), though its absolute returns are more moderate at 57.95% over three months. CLMT ranks second with explosive year-to-date performance of 165.54% and massive outperformance versus SPY of 153.15% annually, but shows slightly weaker ratio consistency (only 3 of 5 ratio passes) with a dip in momentum from 1-month to 1-week returns. Both tickers pass all four major moving average gates (30/50/100/200 day), indicating they're trading above key support levels. EC appears to offer more stable, textbook momentum characteristics, while CLMT represents higher-risk, higher-reward growth with strong absolute gains but less predictable acceleration patterns across timeframes.
